title: GameModeFactory invalid mode guard
description: Make invalid game mode handling fail safely with a clear error path instead of creating an unintended mode or silently continuing.
success_criteria: Unknown modes are detected explicitly and do not create a fallback gameplay mode.
Callers can distinguish unsupported mode from successful mode creation.
Concrete mode implementations are not modified.
risk_points: Changing factory aliases can break existing clients.
BattleRoom can start with a null game mode if the error path is incomplete.
